subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath raised up the heaven of utterance and adorned it with luminous stars and illumined its horizon with the sun of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی رفع سماء البیان و زینها بانجم دریات و نور افقها بشمس ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
